sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, interval_value INTERVAL DAY);
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL 5 DAY), (2, INTERVAL 10 DAY);
SELECT id, subtractInterval(interval_value, INTERVAL 2 DAY) AS new_interval FROM test_intervals;
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval_value = subtractInterval(interval_value, INTERVAL 3 DAY) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT subtractInterval((INTERVAL 1 WEEK, INTERVAL 2 MONTH), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS combined_interval;
